notes: visual-qa-log.json (2026-07-22) verdict 'issues' with three high findings (375/393/900px) — all three describe the SAME thing: the whole web sits behind a mandatory 'Logg på med Apple' gate, so no dashboard content renders for the unauthenticated screenshot harness. Unchanged repeat of the 2026-07-21 finding.

Not code-fixable by this agent: the gate is a DELIBERATE owner decision (commit f905fc70a 'web: hele siden bak Sign in with Apple (eier-beslutning 21.07)'), documented inline in index.html:22-26. body.gated hiding all content until Sign in with Apple succeeds is the designed behaviour, not a rendering bug.

The AUTHENTICATION_FAILED error is — per visual-qa's own note — an artifact of the offline screenshot environment (no network to Apple CloudKit web services), not a bug real signed-in users hit. gate-boot.js / index.html fail gracefully to a calm error card, never a blank page.
The gate screen itself (wordmark, lead copy, sign-in button, error text) is well laid out at all three widths — no overflow, clipping, or truncation. Nothing to fix there.

Fixing would mean REVERSING an explicit owner decision (removing/bypassing the auth gate) and auto-merging that reversal to the live site — outside this agent's mandate ('only genuinely code-fixable UI issues'; 'be conservative, abandon rather than ship anything you can't prove is clean'). Deferred to owner review — no PR opened.
